title: sida tiagii
intro: Sida tiagii, also known as Utah burnweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe burns, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Sida tiagii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Sida tiagii can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is often used topically to treat minor burns, cuts, and scrapes.
